hooks.command: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css)$' | head -20); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then echo "$FILES" | xargs trunk check --fix 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then SECRETS=$(grep -nEi '(sk_live_|sk_test_|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|xox[bpsa]-|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC )?PRIVATE KEY|password\s*=\s*["'\x27][^"'\x27]{8,})' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$SECRETS" ]; then echo "SECRET DETECTED in $FILE:"; echo "$SECRETS"; echo "Use environment variables instead of hardcoded secrets."; exit 1; fi; fi
